creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
The realtek ALC283 audio chip who comes with new hardwares like the Gigabyte Brix [1] isn't supported yet. AFAIK this chip seems to be a sub type of the ALC269 yet supported by the current kernels.

I'm available to test any patch.

[1] http://www.gigabyte.fr/products/product-page.aspx?pid=5038#sp
